extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won sprint in Châteauroux after Kluge/Vanmarcke breakaway caught inside 2km, Deceuninck train dominated positioning.
tactical_patterns: Asgreen/Vanmarcke early attacking forced panic chase when GC threats infiltrated break, shows sprint teams fear bonus seconds leakage.
Deceuninck-QuickStep positioned leadout man Philippe inside final 1km despite WorldFire announcing non-participation, reveals tactical misdirection advantage.
Cavendish launched off Philippe's wheel before traditional final 200m, earlier acceleration suggests confidence in pure speed over positioning.

rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: threatened GC jersey holder Vanderpoort in early move, suggests willingness to attack beyond domestique role
rider_signals.KLUGE Roger: neutral: strong enough to contest intermediate sprint points against peloton despite being in two-man break
rider_signals.GUARNIERI Jacopo: negative: crashed inside final 2km but finished third, indicates fragile positioning despite good form
rider_signals.PHILIPPE Julian: positive: WorldFire announced non-sprint yet Philippe led out Cavendish inside 1km, reveals team using misinformation tactically
